name: Cajun Oysters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium non-stick skillet, simmer 1 pint of drained oysters for 2 minutes until they plump.
2. Remove the oysters with a slotted spoon and add 1 cup of heavy cream and 2 teaspoons (or more) TABASCO SAUCE to the pan.
3. Simmer until the cream thickens lightly.
4. Return the oysters to the cream to warm through and serve in four hollowed-out brioche rolls.
5. Makes four servings.
